items.title: 'My bat is the prize': Shreyas Iyer reveals dressing-room contest
items.summary: Punjab Kings secured a dominant 54-run victory over Lucknow Super Giants, propelling them to the top of the table. Captain Shreyas Iyer revealed a light-hearted six-hitting cont...

items.title: James Bracey ton leads Gloucestershire fightback as Lancashire's injury woes deepen
items.summary: Having already lost seamer Ajeet Singh Dale to a hamstring injury on day one, visitors make second substitution when Luke Wells injures his shoulder
